purpose: Route each DRY_RUN worker from one orchestrator-generated packet instead of manual prompt copy and paste.
fallback_behavior: If the routing packet is missing, Start-AiOsParallelDryRunCrew.ps1 falls back to AIOS_PARALLEL_WORKER_REGISTRY.json.
codex_prompt_delivery: When Codex launch is enabled and prompt_argument_name is UNKNOWN, each worker prompt is delivered through AIOS_CODEX_WORKER_PROMPT.
next_safe_action: Generate the routing packet with Invoke-AiOsWorkflowOrchestrator.ps1, then launch DRY_RUN workers.
